name: Retail Gas Station UST High-Volume Inventory Reporting
description:
The Highway 99 Travel Center is a retail gas station that requires an updated 2024 Tier II submission. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), open the base submission file located at C:\workspace\data\travel_center_base.t2s. 

First, navigate to the facility identification section and update the Primary NAICS code to 457110 (Gasoline Stations with Convenience Stores).

Next, navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add two new entries:
1. Gasoline (CAS: 8006-61-9). Physical Hazards: Flammable. Health Hazards: Carcinogenicity, Aspiration Hazard, Skin Corrosion or Irritation. Maximum Daily Amount: Range Code 08. Average Daily Amount: Range Code 07. Days on Site: 365. Storage: Liquid, Below ground tank, Ambient pressure, Ambient temperature. Location Description: 'UST Basin 1 - North'.
2. Diesel Fuel (CAS: 68476-34-6). Physical Hazards: Flammable. Health Hazards: Carcinogenicity, Aspiration Hazard, Acute toxicity. Maximum Daily Amount: Range Code 09. Average Daily Amount: Range Code 08. Days on Site: 365. Storage: Liquid, Below ground tank, Ambient pressure, Ambient temperature. Location Description: 'UST Basin 2 - South'.

Finally, save the completed submission to C:\workspace\data\travel_center_final.t2s. Do not change any other existing facility data.
